---
title: "Thibaut Lapeyre"
site: distill::distill_website
image: "images/photo.jpg"
#favicon: "images/favicon.ico"
angle: 130
links:
  - label: '`r fontawesome::fa("envelope")` Email'
    url: "mailto:thibautlapeyre@psemail.eu"
  - label: '`r fontawesome::fa("github")` GitHub'
    url: "https://github.com/tiblapeyre"
output:
  distill::distill_article
resource_files:
  - "images/photo.jpg"
  - "images/contis.jpg"
---

<style>
body {
  font-size: 1.1rem;
  position: relative;
}

body::before {
  content: "";
  position: absolute;
  top: 0;
  left: 0;
  right: 0;
  height: 30vh;
  background-image: url("images/contis.jpg");
  background-size: 100% auto;
  background-position: center 35%;
  background-repeat: no-repeat;
  opacity: 0.6;
  z-index: -1;
}

.profile-block {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 340px 650px;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  gap: 0.7rem; /* reduce this */
  margin: 13vh auto 2rem auto;
  padding: 0 1rem;
  max-width: 1100px;
  transform: translateX(-70px);
}

.profile-photo {
  width: 200px !important;
  height: 300px !important;
  object-fit: cover;
  object-position: center 35%;
  border-radius: 10px;
  display: block;
}

.profile-text {
  line-height: 1.6;
  text-align: justify;
  text-justify: inter-word;
  hyphens: auto;
  overflow-wrap: break-word;

  border-left: 1px solid #ddd;
  padding-left: 1.2rem; /* reduce this too */
}

.contact-block {
  margin-top: 1.4rem;
  text-align: left;
}

.page-footer {
  max-width: 700px;
  margin: 14vh auto 0 auto;
  padding: 0.8rem 1rem 0 1rem;
  border-top: 1px solid #ddd;
  font-size: 0.75rem;
  color: #777;
  text-align: left;
  line-height: 1.5;
}
@media (max-width: 760px) {
  body::before {
    height: 28vh;
  }

  .profile-block {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
    gap: 1rem;
    margin-top: 5vh;
    transform: none;
  }

  .profile-photo {
    width: 300px !important;
    height: 230px !important;
    margin: 0 auto;
  }

  .profile-text {
    text-align: left;
  }

  .page-footer {
    margin-top: 5vh;
    font-size: 0.75rem;
  }
}
</style>

<!-- Main profile block -->
<div class="profile-block">
<img src="images/photo.jpg" class="profile-photo" alt="Portrait of Thibaut Lapeyre">

<div class="profile-text">
<p>
Welcome to my personal website! :)

I am a Ph.D. Candidate at the Paris School of Economics working at the intersection of
Transportation Economics and Behavioral Economics, under the supervision of
<a href="https://www.parisschoolofeconomics.eu/personnes/philippe-gagnepain/">Philippe Gagnepain</a> and
<a href="https://www.parisschoolofeconomics.eu/personnes/carine-staropoli/">Carine Staropoli</a>. I'm also a Research Fellow for
<a href="https://www.parisschoolofeconomics.eu/recherche/initiatives-recherche/chaires-de-recherche/new-deal-urbain/">New Deal Urbain Research Chair</a>
and
<a href="https://www.parisschoolofeconomics.eu/en/research/research-initiatives/research-chairs/sustainable-long-distance-mobility-chair/">Sustainable Long-Distance Mobility Chair</a>.
</p>

<p>
I am working on solutions to induce changes in transportation habits
towards more sustainable road modal options (currently congestion pricing and carpooling), using experimental designs.
</p>

<div class="contact-block">
Please, feel free to get in touch!<br>

<a href="mailto:thibaut.lapeyre@psemail.eu" class="email-text-link">
  <span class="email-link">✉</span>
  <em>thibaut.lapeyre[at]psemail.eu</em>
</a>
</div>
</div>

<!-- Bottom reference / update info -->
<div class="page-footer">
<div>
Photo credit: background image, <em>Plages Landes</em>.
</div>
<div>
Last updated: `r format(Sys.Date(), " %B %Y")`
</div>
</div>
